evaluations.title: Agent evaluation benchmark adds recovery metric
evaluations.public_title: Agent evaluation benchmark adds recovery metric
evaluations.public_summary: A synthetic benchmark update adds an explicit recovery metric for tool-use failures.
evaluations.public_why_it_matters: Recovery behavior is a concrete indicator of whether agent systems can handle failed tool calls without brittle manual intervention.
evaluations.public_watch_next: Watch whether model providers report recovery rates alongside task-completion benchmarks.
evaluations.public_attribution: Source attributed to Synthetic Research Lab benchmark note.
evaluations.source_authority: First-party synthetic lab source for fixture validation.
evaluations.confidence_summary: High confidence fixture with complete attribution.
